summary: Resume contains a critical typo in skills ('AWS1 CodeBuild'), fabricated role title, unsupported OpenShift/Istio claims, and missing contact info block that would break ATS parsing.

issues.issue: Critical typo: 'AWS1 CodeBuild' instead of 'AWS CodeBuild' in skills section
issues.where: CI/CD & GitOps: 'Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS1 CodeBuild, ArgoCD'

issues.issue: Role title changed from 'DevOps Engineer' to 'Cloud / DevOps Engineer' — this is a fabricated title not supported by candidate facts
issues.where: Experience section: 'Cloud / DevOps Engineer | eSparkBiz · Ahmedabad, India | Jun 2025 – Apr 2026'
issues.suggestion: Revert to actual title: 'DevOps Engineer' — do not inflate titles to match JD

issues.issue: OpenShift and Istio are listed in experience bullet but candidate only has 'used in environment, not lead operator' and 'installed and configured, not deep traffic engineering' per master brief — yet presented as production operational experience
issues.where: Experience bullet: 'Operated Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift) clusters with ArgoCD GitOps, Helm, Istio service mesh...'
issues.suggestion: Remove OpenShift and Istio from this bullet, or reframe to 'exposure to OpenShift and Istio' in skills section only; do not claim operational ownership

issues.issue: Contact information block (name, email, phone, location, LinkedIn, GitHub) is completely missing from the generated resume JSON — only present in original cv.md
issues.where: Entire resume header — no contact info in generated content
issues.suggestion: Add complete contact header: Uday Varmora, +91 96623 85170, varmorauday1045@gmail.com, Ahmedabad, India, linkedin.com/in/udayvarmora, github.com/udayvarmora07

issues.issue: Bullet B6 (security posture) is used but not in the approved 5-6 bullet selection for this resume context; more critically, 'IRSA and Pod Identity' are specific technical mechanisms not verified in master brief as claimed achievements
issues.where: Experience bullet: 'enforced least-privilege IAM via IRSA and Pod Identity'
issues.suggestion: Simplify to 'enforced least-privilege IAM policies' or verify candidate actually implemented IRSA and Pod Identity specifically; if uncertain, remove specific mechanisms

issues.issue: Bullet B7 (AWS architecture breadth) is used but this was designated as 'Cloud Engineer variant' in master brief — mixing variant bullets without role alignment may create inconsistency
issues.where: First experience bullet: 'Architected and operated production AWS infrastructure spanning EC2, EKS, Lambda, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, and CloudWatch...'
issues.suggestion: Either commit to Cloud Engineer framing throughout, or replace with standard DevOps bullet B1 or B3

issues.issue: Missing several high-value keywords from typical Cloud/DevOps JDs: 'GitOps' (only in skills, not bullets), 'microservices' (present but could be stronger), 'infrastructure as code' (only 'IaC' abbreviation), 'monitoring' vs 'observability', 'automation', 'scripting'
issues.suggestion: Add 'GitOps' to summary; spell out 'Infrastructure as Code' at least once; ensure 'automation' and 'scripting' appear in summary

issues.issue: Date format inconsistency: experience uses 'Jun 2025 – Apr 2026' but education uses '2021 – 2025' (no month abbreviations)
issues.suggestion: Standardize to consistent format: either both with months or both without; recommend 'Jun 2021 – May 2025' for education

issues.issue: Number formatting inconsistency: '30% ($500+/month)' vs '~30% reduced image pull latency' — one uses tilde, one doesn't; '60%+' vs '82% (45 → 8 min)'
issues.where: Various bullets across experience and projects
issues.suggestion: Standardize: use either '~30%' or '30%' consistently; use '60%' or '60%+' consistently throughout

issues.issue: Summary is metric-heavy but lacks narrative cohesion — reads as list of percentages rather than story; '1+ year' is repeated but no progression shown
issues.suggestion: Restructure to: 'DevOps Engineer with 1+ year architecting AWS cloud-native infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines for 20+ services. Delivered 82% faster releases, 80% faster provisioning, and 30% compute cost reduction through Terraform IaC, Kubernetes automation, and Linux-based production operations.'

issues.issue: Skills section uses nested arrays with category headers — may not parse correctly in plain text or some ATS systems
issues.suggestion: Consider flattening to standard bullet or comma-separated format for ATS safety, or ensure PDF rendering produces clean text

issues.issue: Color scheme 'teal' is specified but no indication this matches target company branding or JD tone; master brief specifies navy/gold as default for enterprise/cloud roles
issues.suggestion: Consider switching to 'navy' per master brief default for Cloud/SRE roles unless targeting startup specifically
